title: Julian Sterling's Dossier
content:
The screen flickers to life, displaying a high-resolution file on the laptop.||NAME: Julian Sterling
AGE: 46
POSITION: Senior Analyst at Atlas Foundation.
RELATION TO VICTIM: Former mentor. Known to have leaked internal documents to Vane regarding the 'Syndicate' laundering schemes.||The file contains a frantic final message from Sterling to Vane: 'They found the leak. If you're reading this, I'm already gone. Don't go to the office. Meet me at Warehouse 14, Pier 9 — the industrial zone hideout.'||It's clear now. Sterling wasn't just a source; he was a target.||📝 FILES UPDATED: Julian Sterling's profile and hideout address added.
